objective: Implement passkey-first login with email fallback
workers: implementation:write auth UI, server handlers, and auth tests
validation: npm test -- auth;npm run lint;npm run typecheck
claim: candidate implementation only; not production-ready until human review and deploy approval
automation: manual first round only; automation disabled until one successful implementation and review cycle
discovery: auth issues, failing auth tests, recent auth commits
connectors: GitHub connector if exposed; otherwise manual PR links and local git diff
worktree_policy: one Codex worktree per writing Worker; Controller remains read-only
review: review required before PASS if any code/config/PR diff exists
